rationale: Despite 9.5 years of experience, the profile is entirely non-technical: sales, customer support, and marketing roles at TCS and a fictional company (Pied Piper), with no ML, IR, or engineering depth whatsoever.
A Marketing Manager with only 2.6 years of experience whose sole role is at fictional company Pied Piper; no ML, retrieval, or engineering experience of any kind — classic honeypot profile.

IIT Roorkee CS grad with 4.8 years at product companies (Wysa HealthTech, Unacademy EdTech), expert-level Qdrant and recommendation systems, shipped RAG features with LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, and owns the eval framework — strong alignment with core IR/ranking requirements.

6 years at product companies (Netflix, Mad Street Den) with hands-on BM25 + sentence-transformer hybrid search, FAISS/Pinecone/Qdrant vector infra, fine-tuning LLMs, recommendation systems at 10M+ user scale, and explicit ownership of NDCG-style evaluation rigor — near-perfect fit.

Sales Executive with 2.6 years in non-technical roles (business analyst, operations) at fictional company Stark Industries, with only superficial online course exposure to RAG — zero production ML or IR experience.

Entire 4.8-year career is at IT-services firms (TCS and Cognizant) doing frontend and QA work; self-described AI/ML experience is limited to online courses and a side-project RAG prototype, with no production IR or ranking systems delivered.

2.6 years as a Cloud/DevOps engineer (AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes) at a non-IT-services company, with skills in OpenCV and YOLO (computer vision) but no NLP, retrieval, or ranking experience — wrong domain despite solid engineering fundamentals.

7.3 years spent entirely in Operations Manager and HR Manager roles at fictional companies (Initech, Stark Industries) with no technical engineering or ML work — purely non-technical career with AI curiosity only.

Only 1.3 years of experience as a Mechanical Engineer at Infosys (IT-services) with marketing-focused work descriptions; despite tier_2 AI degrees (DCE, COEP), there is no demonstrated production ML or IR work.

3.1 years in Customer Support at Wipro and a Project Manager role at fictional company Wayne Enterprises, with no ML, NLP, or retrieval engineering experience — non-technical profile with AI keyword inflation.
